nasb.text: And they shall not marry a widow or a divorced woman but shall take virgins from the offspring of the house of Israel, or a widow who is the widow of a priest.

esv.text: They shall not marry a widow or a divorced woman, but only virgins of the offspring of the house of Israel, or a widow who is the widow of a priest.

cnv.text: 他們不可娶寡婦或被休的婦人；只可娶以色列後裔中的處女，或是祭司留下的寡婦。

ccb.text: 他们不可娶寡妇或被休的妇女为妻，只能娶以色列的处女或祭司的遗孀。
